brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Silver zone transformation of College Scorecard institution-level cost data. Reads raw.college_scorecard_institution (Bronze, 28 fields) and produces base.college_scorecard_institution (Silver, 35 fields). Key business logic: (1) control-based routing resolves the public/private net-price ambiguity (rows carry both NPT4_PUB and NPT4_PRIV values; control picks one), (2) unified cost_of_attendance_annual collapses costt4_a (academic-year) and costt4_p (program-year) into a single measure via COALESCE, (3) 4-year multipliers produce long-term totals used by honest ROI (net_price_annual * 4 * loan_pct), (4) control label mapping replaces opaque integers with human-readable strings, (5) all quintile fields routed the same way as top-line net price, (6) raw fields passed through with _raw suffix for provenance and audit. Idempotent promote on record_id (hash of unitid with prefix 'csi'). Rows skipped if unitid/instnm/stabbr null or control unmappable.

documentation.description: Silver zone transformer for College Scorecard institution-level data. Reads raw.college_scorecard_institution from Bronze and produces base.college_scorecard_institution with: (1) unified cost_of_attendance (coalesce costt4_a / costt4_p), (2) unified net_price with control-based public/private routing, (3) unified net_price_q1..q5 by income quintile using the same routing, (4) 4-year total derivations (annual * 4), (5) human-readable institution_control label, (6) tuition and living-cost pass-through, (7) raw field pass-through with _raw suffix for provenance. Grain: unitid (one row per institution). Uses Brightsmith promote pattern for idempotent upsert on record_id.

record_id.transformationDescription: Deterministic hash-based grain ID computed by brightsmith.infra.grain.compute_grain_id over GRAIN_FIELDS=['unitid'] with GRAIN_PREFIX='csi'. Form: 'csi_<hash>'. Used as the idempotent upsert key by the promote pattern.

unitid.transformationDescription: Direct pass-through of the IPEDS institution identifier (LONG). Null rows are skipped in transform_row() before promotion.

institution_name.transformationDescription: Direct rename from bronze 'instnm' to silver 'institution_name'. Null or empty values cause the row to be skipped.

state_abbr.transformationDescription: Direct rename from bronze 'stabbr' (2-letter state abbreviation) to silver 'state_abbr'. Null or empty values cause the row to be skipped.

institution_control.transformationDescription: Integer control code mapped to human-readable string via CONTROL_LABELS: 1 -> 'Public', 2 -> 'Private nonprofit', 3 -> 'Private for-profit'. Rows with null or unmappable control are skipped (required field per physical model).

cost_of_attendance_annual.transformationDescription: Unified cost-of-attendance: COALESCE(costt4_a, costt4_p). Prefers academic-year COA; falls back to program-year COA when academic-year is null. Returns null only if both are null.

cost_of_attendance_4yr.transformationDescription: 4-year total cost of attendance: cost_of_attendance_annual * 4, via null-propagating multiply_or_none(). Null if cost_of_attendance_annual is null.

net_price_annual.transformationDescription: Unified net price with control-based routing via pick_by_control(): control=1 -> npt4_pub; control in {2,3} -> npt4_priv. Null if control is null or outside {1,2,3} so missing control does not silently collapse to the private branch. Resolves the public/private net-price ambiguity that exists in the source.

net_price_4yr.transformationDescription: 4-year total net price: net_price_annual * 4, via null-propagating multiply_or_none(). This is the key input to honest ROI (net_price_4yr * loan_pct) used downstream in Gold.

net_price_q1.transformationDescription: Net price for income quintile 1 ($0-$30K), control-routed: control=1 -> npt41_pub; control in {2,3} -> npt41_priv. Null if control outside {1,2,3}.

net_price_q2.transformationDescription: Net price for income quintile 2 ($30K-$48K), control-routed: control=1 -> npt42_pub; control in {2,3} -> npt42_priv.

net_price_q3.transformationDescription: Net price for income quintile 3 ($48K-$75K), control-routed: control=1 -> npt43_pub; control in {2,3} -> npt43_priv.

net_price_q4.transformationDescription: Net price for income quintile 4 ($75K-$110K), control-routed: control=1 -> npt44_pub; control in {2,3} -> npt44_priv.

net_price_q5.transformationDescription: Net price for income quintile 5 ($110K+), control-routed: control=1 -> npt45_pub; control in {2,3} -> npt45_priv.

tuition_in_state.transformationDescription: Direct rename from bronze 'tuitionfee_in' to silver 'tuition_in_state'. Double pass-through.

tuition_out_of_state.transformationDescription: Direct rename from bronze 'tuitionfee_out' to silver 'tuition_out_of_state'. Double pass-through.

room_board_on_campus.transformationDescription: Direct rename from bronze 'roomboard_on' to silver 'room_board_on_campus'. Double pass-through.

room_board_off_campus.transformationDescription: Direct rename from bronze 'roomboard_off' to silver 'room_board_off_campus'. Double pass-through.

books_supplies.transformationDescription: Direct rename from bronze 'booksupply' to silver 'books_supplies'. Double pass-through.

costt4_a_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of costt4_a (academic-year cost of attendance) for provenance and audit. Preserved alongside the unified cost_of_attendance_annual so analysts can see which input was used.

costt4_p_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of costt4_p (program-year cost of attendance) for provenance and audit.

npt4_pub_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of npt4_pub (average net price, public institutions) for provenance and audit. Preserved even when control routing selected npt4_priv so the full source record is auditable.

npt4_priv_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of npt4_priv (average net price, private institutions) for provenance and audit. Preserved even when control routing selected npt4_pub.

npt41_pub_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of npt41_pub (public institution net price, quintile 1: $0-$30K) for provenance.

npt42_pub_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of npt42_pub (public institution net price, quintile 2: $30K-$48K) for provenance.

npt43_pub_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of npt43_pub (public institution net price, quintile 3: $48K-$75K) for provenance.

npt44_pub_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of npt44_pub (public institution net price, quintile 4: $75K-$110K) for provenance.

npt45_pub_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of npt45_pub (public institution net price, quintile 5: $110K+) for provenance.

npt41_priv_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of npt41_priv (private institution net price, quintile 1: $0-$30K) for provenance.

npt42_priv_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of npt42_priv (private institution net price, quintile 2: $30K-$48K) for provenance.

npt43_priv_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of npt43_priv (private institution net price, quintile 3: $48K-$75K) for provenance.

npt44_priv_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of npt44_priv (private institution net price, quintile 4: $75K-$110K) for provenance.

npt45_priv_raw.transformationDescription: Raw pass-through of npt45_priv (private institution net price, quintile 5: $110K+) for provenance.

source_load_date.transformationDescription: Direct rename from bronze 'load_date' to silver 'source_load_date'. Preserves the Bronze ingest date for downstream staleness checks and time-travel queries.

ingested_at.transformationDescription: Silver-generated UTC timestamp set at the moment of Silver transformation (datetime.datetime.now(tz=utc) inside transform_row). NOT the Bronze ingested_at; this marks when the Silver row was produced. Used for Silver-zone freshness metrics.
